{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=A royal valuable that somehow ended up in the hands of commoners. A rich family from the south won the bid for it, and used it as their chamber pot.
|affct=FTH
|hard=HP
|source=Divine Chaos Chest (0.2%)
|color=purple
|earth=8
|water=6
|fire=5
|wind=7
|form=Angel
|element=Water
|realm=Kemet
|orangehard=HP
}}
